case_title: NEVAREZ, NINA VS DONG, HARRY DBA H&P AUTO REPAIR & TOWING

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $468.33 FILED BY NEVAREZ, NINA AS TO DEFENDANT DONG, HARRY DBA H&P AUTO REPAIR & TOWING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-10-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DONG, HARRY DBA H&P AUTO REPAIR & TOWING

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEVAREZ, NINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DONG, HARRY DBA H&P AUTO REPAIR & TOWING $468.33 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $508.33, DEFENDANT TAM DONG, AN INDIVIDUAL DISMISSED WITH OUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
